summary: Execute a research data collection process with instrument deployment, participant recruitment, data quality monitoring, and dataset compilation.

inputs.name: collection_protocol
inputs.description: Approved data collection protocol with instruments and procedures.

inputs.name: sampling_plan
inputs.description: Sampling strategy, sample size, and recruitment approach.

inputs.name: ethics_clearance
inputs.description: Confirmation of ethics approval or IRB clearance.

outputs.name: recruitment_log
outputs.description: Log of participant recruitment progress and response rates.

outputs.name: compiled_dataset
outputs.description: Validated and compiled dataset ready for analysis.

outputs.name: quality_report
outputs.description: Data quality report with completeness and consistency metrics.

gates.rule: Confirm ethics clearance is obtained before any data collection begins.
Verify collection protocol and instruments are finalized.
Check data quality metrics meet pre-defined thresholds.
Dataset must pass completeness and consistency validation.

steps.action: Finalize and pilot test data collection instruments.
Execute recruitment strategy and track response rates.
Deploy instruments and collect data with quality monitoring.
Validate data completeness, consistency, and handle missing values.
Compile validated dataset with documentation and quality report.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read collection protocol and instrument files.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Save compiled dataset, logs, and quality reports.

tools.name: web.search
tools.purpose: Search for recruitment channels or panel services.

verification.method: Verify ethics approval documented before collection started.
Verify data quality metrics meet pre-defined thresholds.
Verify compiled dataset passes completeness validation.

success_criteria: Recruitment meets the planned sample size within acceptable margins.
Data quality metrics exceed pre-defined thresholds.
Compiled dataset is documented and ready for analysis.

rollback.when: If data quality falls below thresholds, pause collection and remediate before continuing.
